section_schema.name: text
section_schema.default: CRAFTING SMILES, ONE TOY AT A TIME

section_schema.name: bg_color
section_schema.description: Optional section background (leave empty = transparent, uses site cream canvas)

section_schema.name: scroll_duration
section_schema.description: Seconds for one full scroll loop

section_schema.name: scroll_duration_hover
section_schema.description: Loop duration while hovering the strip (slower = higher number)

section_schema.name: repeat_segments
section_schema.description: How many phrase copies in the tape (seamless loop)
